iam.ResourceMetadata.description: IAM resource metadata embedded in services models

value.description: Value to use in order to filter tags

service.RenewType.description: Map a possible renew for a specific service

deleteAtExpiration.description: The service will be deleted at expiration

forced.description: The service forced to be renewed

manualPayment.description: The service needs to be manually renewed and paid

possibleRenewPeriod.description: All the possible renew period of your service in month

contactAdmin.description: The contact to set as admin contact

contactBilling.description: The contact to set as billing contact

contactTech.description: The contact to set as tech contact

commentaryReason.description: Commentary about your reason for termination request

futureUse.description: All future uses you can provide for a service termination

reason.description: All reasons you can provide for a service termination

progress.description: Percentage of the source share’s data that has been successfully replicated to the destination share

compatible.description: Whether service can be used as destination

Share space percentage reserved for snapshots

isDefault.description: Is this the default snapshot policy?

days.description: The days of the month the schedule runs (1 through 31). Empty for all.

hours.description: The hours of the day the schedule runs (0 through 23). Empty for all.

minutes.description: The minutes the schedule runs (0 through 59). Required to have at least one value.

months.description: The months of the year the schedule runs (1 through 12). Empty for all.

weekdays.description: The days of the week the schedule runs (0 through 6, where 0 is Sunday and 6 is Saturday). Empty for all.
